questions.question: Why do SPAs need to manage focus manually after route changes?
options: Vue Router removes all focus on navigation for security reasons
The browser never reloads the page, so focus stays wherever it was before
Screen readers require JavaScript to announce page changes
HTML5 history API resets the scroll position but not focus

questions.question: What does tabindex="-1" accomplish when applied to an h1 element for focus management?
options: It adds the heading to the end of the tab order
It removes the heading from all keyboard navigation entirely
It makes the heading programmatically focusable without adding it to the tab order
It gives the heading the highest tab priority

questions.question: What three things does the native <dialog> element's showModal() handle automatically?
options: Adds ARIA roles, closes on Escape, and fires a close event
Moves focus inside, traps tab cycling, and restores focus on Escape close
Prevents scrolling, centers the dialog, and adds a backdrop
Announces to screen readers, traps focus, and hides background content
